tasks.title: Define JSON Schemas & Config Templates
tasks.context_slice: Create the strict JSON Schemas (tasks, state, pipeline, mcp) and the default YAML playbooks. These must reside in system-template/ to be copied during init.

tasks.title: Implement state-manager.js
tasks.context_slice: Build lib/core/state-manager.js. It must read/write .agent-state.json deterministically and safely parse tasks.json to extract the active task and its context_slice.

tasks.title: Implement git-sandbox.js
tasks.context_slice: Build lib/core/git-sandbox.js. Expose functions to `git checkout -b agent/<TASK_ID>`, stage files, commit using conventional format, and revert to main.

tasks.title: Implement mcp-merger.js & ENV Interpolation
tasks.context_slice: Build lib/core/mcp-merger.js. It must read ~/.agent-system/mcp-defaults.json, ./.agents/mcp-custom.json, and .env. It must deep-merge them and replace ${VAR} syntax securely in memory.

tasks.title: Implement pi-runner.js (Adapter)
tasks.context_slice: Build lib/adapters/pi-runner.js. Use child_process.spawn to run `pi`. Detect AI_GATEWAY_URL in process.env and override OPENAI_BASE_URL if present before spawning.

tasks.title: Implement dag-runner.js (State Machine)
tasks.context_slice: Build lib/core/dag-runner.js. This is the main while loop. It reads the current playbook phase, invokes pi-runner, and evaluates exit codes to enforce the Adversarial TDD gate and retry logic.

tasks.title: Implement CLI Handlers (init, claim, complete)
tasks.context_slice: Build lib/cli/*.js to handle the sf commands. Setup Commander.js in bin/sf.js with detailed -h output. Map the human-pairing commands (claim/complete) to modify tasks.json.

tasks.title: Build install.sh script
tasks.context_slice: Write install.sh to create ~/.agent-system/, copy the system-template into it, npm install dependencies, and symlink bin/sf.js to a global executable path.
